items.title: Leprecunt Irish St Patricks Day Funny Shamrock Women's T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: leprecunt, irish, patricks, day, shamrock. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: mens, saint, patricks, day, shirts, pattys, tees, partying, parade, guys. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
